docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $560.00 FILED BY CHU, PATTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCHI, ROBERT LUSCUTOFF,  LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARCHI, ROBERT
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT ROBERT MARCHI, NOTICES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
CORRESPONDECNE FROM ROBERT W. MARCHI FILED. STIPULATION TO CHALLENGE OF VENUE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, PATTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCHI, ROBERT LUSCUTOFF,  LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $446.00, BY STIPULATION DEFT. WAS AMENDED TO LUSTCUTOFF, LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUSCUTOFF,  LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LUSCUTOFF,  LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $479.61 AS TO DEFENDANT LUSCUTOFF,  LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES
